summary: Virginia Green CID→SID→MID smoke test halted at Step 1. The table outreach.signal_output referenced in the test plan does not exist. Hard gate triggered per execution requirements: stop on first failure.

smoke_test_results.name: Insert signal into outreach.signal_output
smoke_test_results.issues: Table outreach.signal_output does not exist. Outreach schema contains only: blog, dol, outreach. This table was listed in db_targets but has never been created.

smoke_test_results.name: Insert bridged signal into lcs.signal_queue directly
Run CID compiler logic and write lcs.cid COMPILED row
Run SID worker logic and write lcs.sid_output row
Run MID engine logic and write lcs.mid_sequence_state QUEUED row
Verify Lovable pickup path via lcs.event delivery record

root_cause: outreach.signal_output is referenced in the smoke test work packet db_targets and Step 1, but the table has never been created in the Neon database. The outreach schema only contains: outreach (sovereign_id mapping), blog, and dol. A migration to create outreach.signal_output is needed before this smoke test can proceed.
recommended_action: Route a work packet to DB Agent to create outreach.signal_output with appropriate schema, then re-execute this smoke test.

deviations.detail: outreach.signal_output listed in db_targets does not exist — Planner assumed table existence
